description: Navigate to Wallace Creek in the Carrizo Plain, California (35.2715°N, 119.8272°W) and measure the horizontal stream channel offset caused by the San Andreas Fault. Create a placemark named 'Wallace Creek Offset' with the measured offset value in meters in the description. Save to /home/ga/Documents/wallace_creek_offset.kml.

metadata.data_source: USGS GNIS Feature ID 251842, Sieh & Jahns (1984) GSA Bulletin
metadata.geological_context: San Andreas Fault right-lateral offset, ~128.6m accumulated over ~3700 years
